fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Cette démo technique est le fruit de notre collaboration continuelle et du chemin parcouru depuis la première release de PokémonSDK.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of PokémonSDK.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of PokémonSDK.

kana: :[name=SirMalo]:This technical demo is the result of our continued collaboration and shows how far we've come since the first release of PokémonSDK.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Bien entendu, PokémonSDK ne serait jamais arrivé jusqu'à ce niveau sans les divers contributeurs qui ont tous apporté leur pierre à l'édifice !
en: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, PokémonSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Of course, PokémonSDK would never have reached this level without all the contributors who played their part!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour ce qui est de cette démo, elle te permettra d'essayer en jeu les différents systèmes que nous offrons avec PokémonSDK.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with PokémonSDK ingame.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with PokémonSDK ingame.

kana: :[name=SirMalo]:As far as this demo is concerned, it will let you test the different systems we offer with PokémonSDK ingame.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Mais elle est aussi en lien avec Pokémon Studio, et elle te permettra de voir comment ces fonctionnalités sont implémentées.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Pokémon Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:But it is also connected with Pokémon Studio, and it will let you see how these features are implemented.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu arriveras sous peu sur l'Île, une collection de maps sur lesquelles tu pourras te balader et expérimenter.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:You will soon arrive on the Island, a collection of maps on which you will be able to explore and experiment on.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Je te conseille de d'abord te rendre à la Tour, ça sera le début de ton parcours dans cette démo.\nlQuelqu'un t'y attend.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.

ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You'll want to start by going to the Tower, as it will be the beginning of your journey. Someone will wait for you there.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Mais avant de te laisser partir, je vais te demander quelques informations.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.

es: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:But before you leave, I have to ask you for some information.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Sais-tu comment changer tes touches ?
en: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
es: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Do you know how to change your controls?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Super ! Continuons avec la prochaine question.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
es: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Great! Then let's continue with the next question.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour changer tes touches, appuie sur la touche F1 à tout moment après cette introduction !
en: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
it: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
es: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:To change your controls, press the F1 button at any point after this introduction!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu pourras alors modifier tes contrôles comme bon te semble.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
es: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You can then modify your controls as you see fit.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Passons à la question suivante.
en: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
es: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Let's move on to the next question.

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Quelle est l'apparence qui te définit le mieux ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:You don’t look like anyone from around here and you carry no pack, no supplies… and not a single Critter! Tell me, who are you exactly?
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:No parece usted ser de estas tierras… y no lleva mochila ni provisiones… ¡ni siquiera un Critter le acompaña! Dígame, si es tan amable… ¿quién es usted?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Which appearence defines you the best?

fr: Gauche
en: Left
it: Left
de: Left
es: Izquierda
ko: Left
kana: Left

fr: Droite
en: Right
it: Right
de: Right
es: Derecha
ko: Right
kana: Right

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Pour finir, quel est ton nom ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:Don't you remember who you are? That's strange. Do you at least remember your name?
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:¿No recuerda usted quién es? Qué extraño… ¿recuerda al menos su nombre?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Finally, what is your name?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1] ? C'est un très beau nom !\nlJe l'ai bien écrit ?
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:So… your name is \n[1]? Are you certain that is your true name?"
it: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
de: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:Así que… su nombre es \n[1]. Dígame, ¿está usted seguro de que ese es su verdadero nombre?
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:\n[1]? It's a great name!\nlDid I write it properly?

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tout est bon, jeune Maker !
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:Ah... you're awake. Good. I was beginning to think you might never open your eyes! I'm elder Theodric. I found you unconscious on the outskirts of our village.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:Ah… ya ha despertado. Qué alivio. Comenzaba a temer que jamás volvería a abrir los ojos. Soy el anciano Theodric; lo hallé inconsciente en las afueras de nuestro pueblo.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:We're done, young Maker!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Tu vas pouvoir expérimenter cette démo et découvrir les fonctionnalités de PokémonSDK !
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:You collapsed not far from Holtheim, a small village in the Upper Layers. Strange… travelers rarely come this way. And stranger still… none travel these roads without a Critter. Yet you carried none.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of PokémonSDK!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of PokémonSDK!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:Se desplomó no muy lejos de Holtheim, un pequeño pueblo en las Capas Superiores. Qué extraño… pocos viajeros pasan por este camino. Y más extraño aún… nadie recorre estos senderos sin un Critter. Sin embargo, usted no llevaba ninguno.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of PokémonSDK!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:You can now experiment with this demo and discover the features of PokémonSDK!

fr: :[name=SirMalo]:Amuse-toi bien !
en: :[name=Elder Theodric]:Rest now, \n[1]. Make yourself at home in Holtheim. Soon enough, we will find you a Critter.
it: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
de: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
es: :[name=Anciano Theodric]:Descanse ahora, \n[1]. Considérese como en casa en Holtheim. A su debido tiempo, veremos de conseguirle su propio Critter.
ko: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
kana: :[name=SirMalo]:Have fun!
